resources.string: Total Capacity : %1$s MB\nUsed Space : %2$s MB\nFree Space : %3$s MB
Storage Error: Failed to calculate space.
Match Status Bar to Theme Font
Low-res dithered cover tinted to theme font color
Cover Flow flip and animated handoff to Now Playing
Artwork will be shown in a 3D perspective
Artwork will be shown in a flat 2D style
Crash and error logs are sent to the developer over Reach.
Diagnostic logs are not sent automatically.
Report on GitHub or message us from this device when Reach is connected.
Reach reporting needs Wi‑Fi and peer connectivity. GitHub is always available.
Opens a private message thread to the Solar developer on Reach.
Report bugs on the web at github.com/thesolarproject/solar — or message us from this device when Reach is connected.
Connect to Wi‑Fi with Reach peer connectivity to report from this device.
List each credited artist separately when tags use feat., &, or similar.
Merge albums that differ only by capitalization.
For artists who only appear as guests, choose albums or songs first.
Limit the Artists list — hide one-track guests or show album owners only.
Order the Artists list A–Z, by track count, or by recently added.
Default sort for song lists in Artists, Albums, Genres, and playlists.
Under albums, show the album owner when it differs from the track artist.
On guest tracks, show which artist owns the album below the song title.
Solar Reach is a Soulseek client — search peers and download tracks to Music.
Solar Reach · Soulseek network · Wi-Fi required
Ranked by free slot & upload speed. [***] = most likely to download.
Leave Reach and cancel this download?
Too many peer connections — try again in a moment.
Download paused — offline playback limited to buffered audio.
Turns off Wi‑Fi 15 minutes after the screen sleeps on battery. Wi‑Fi turns back on when you wake the device or plug in.
Deletes the .rockbox folder from Internal Storage (/storage/sdcard0). Rockbox settings, themes, and playlists stored there will be removed.
Clears all Solar app preferences (settings, library rules, Reach/Deezer options, and similar). Does not delete music files unless you also choose MicroSD contents.
Deletes downloaded and custom theme folders on Internal Storage (Themes/ and JJ_Themes/) and Solar\u2019s internal theme cache.
Removes every file and folder on MicroSD. Files are overwritten once before deletion so standard recovery tools may still find them \u2014 this is not a secure wipe.
Clears album-art caches, Flow thumbnails, stream/download temp files, and other Solar cache data.
Selects all reset options below. Review each item before continuing.
Runs the selected reset steps. You will be asked to confirm before anything is deleted.

This will permanently delete the items you selected:

%1$s

Continue?
Select at least one item to reset.
Turn off USB storage before resetting MicroSD contents.
Reset failed. Some items may be unchanged.
Enable USB storage automatically when a PC connects.
Don\u2019t show USB storage prompt when a cable is connected.
No installed themes match this filter.
No downloadable themes match this filter.
Connect to the internet to browse online themes.
Settings can\'t be hidden. Use Arrange to change its position.
This will interrupt downloads, streaming, or music sharing in progress.
Prev: delete · Play: OK\nNext: space · Hold Play: Aa / # · Wheel: pick · Center: type · Back: cancel
Turn the wheel to adjust the brightness.
Enter the above address in your PC browser.\nPress [Back] to return.
The Web Server is still active. Do you want to shut it down completely and exit?
Internet connection required to browse online themes.
Failed to load themes.\nCheck Wi-Fi and try again.
Enter a username and password to log in. Soulseek creates the account on first successful login. Inactive 30+ days may be recycled.
Login failed: %1$s — check Settings → Account or Regenerate.
Invalid account — reset to new auto account.
Reach uses Soulseek TCP port %1$d. If downloads fail, forward this port on your router.
Download-only — some users only allow downloaders who share files.
Listen port: connect to Reach first
Forward this TCP port on your router for downloads.
Sharing: off (NAT-PMP unavailable on this network)

Sharing and profile exchange run whenever you are on Wi‑Fi with a successful NAT-PMP port forward — no charger needed. Turn Wi‑Fi off to stop Reach from using the network; without Wi‑Fi or NAT-PMP the Soulseek client stays disconnected to save power.
Soulseek search, messaging, chat rooms, and peer sharing.
Soulseek is off. Enable it in Settings → Reach.
Reach is turned off. Enable it here to search and share on Soulseek.
Reach cannot accept peer connections on this network. Downloads, search, and sharing need a mapped listen port (NAT-PMP or manual router forward).
You appear to be on a mobile data connection. Reach rarely works on 4G/5G or Personal Hotspot because carriers use CG-NAT and block inbound ports.
Your router did not grant a NAT-PMP port map. Try home Wi‑Fi with UPnP/NAT-PMP enabled, or forward the TCP listen port shown in Connection.
No local gateway was found — common on captive portal Wi‑Fi, guest networks, or isolated work/school VLANs.
The port map dropped and did not come back. Peer transfers are paused until mapping succeeds again.
The Soulseek server connection may still work — messages and account settings can remain available.
Peer features are off on this network. Connect to home Wi‑Fi with port forwarding, or use Messages if enabled.
Reach peer connection lost — transfers may fail on this network.
Thank you for %1$s from %2$s — Check out Reach for Innioasis %3$s
Lets you send and receive private messages with other Soulseek users. Your Reach friend code is shown when messaging is enabled.
No other Reach users online in the last 24 hours.
Reach directory is not configured on this build.
Search for a chat room to join.
*%1$s* is writing from an Innioasis %2$s using the Reach client. They may write replies slowly as they are on an MP3 player. (No really - github.com/thesolarproject/solar)
This user has no browsable files right now.
No conversations yet. Press OK on New message to start one.
%1$d conversation(s). Select a contact to open the thread.
This user may require you to share files. Enable sharing in Reach settings and wait for your library to index.
%1$s is online but lists no shared files — they may require reciprocity.
Enable sharing in Reach settings to download from users who require reciprocity.
No messages yet. Select a message and press OK to reply.
Reach is a Soulseek client built for Innioasis %1$s music players — browse, search, download, message, and share from your player over Wi‑Fi.\nhttps://github.com/thesolarproject/solar
I\'m happy to share my library. Folder browse from my player can be unreliable while I\'m away; downloads work best when my player is online at home.
My library is not shared from this player.
Feel free to send a message!
Private messaging is off on this player.
Generate a new friend code? Your current Soulseek account will be replaced.
Settings: Reach / Soulseek / Find Reach users
Deezer search and downloads in Get Music.
Deezer is off. Enable it in Settings → Reach.
Set up Deezer on PC — start Wi‑Fi Transfer, open /deezer
Device is in USB Storage mode
Eject this player from your computer, then disconnect the USB cable to continue using Solar.
Please disconnect the USB to view your playback queue.
On your PC browser, open the address above.\nLog in to Deezer and paste your arl cookie.\nPress [Back] when finished.
You can return here any time from Settings → Deezer → Set up on PC.
A built-in test ARL is active for testers. Paste your own arl below to replace it.
When on, Reach search results appear in Get Music and Get more.
When on, Deezer search results appear in Get Music and Get more.
No music services available for Get Music. Check Settings.
No matches on Deezer or Reach
Sign in to Deezer in Settings
Keep holding Back to quit Solar…
No data yet (%1$s). Peer may be offline, queued, or blocked — try another result.
Reach server unreachable — will retry in the background.
Peer offline or unreachable — try another result.
Could not connect to peer — check Wi‑Fi and port forwarding.
Peer did not respond — they may be offline or queueing uploads.
File transfer timed out — forward your Reach listen port on the router.
Searching finished: %1$s (%2$d results) — download in progress
No other peers with this exact filename
Reach maps your listen port via NAT-PMP (retries alternate gateways, renews every 30 min). If mapping fails, forward the TCP port above on your router.
Search the Soulseek network and download tracks to Music.
Solar Reach — Soulseek client. Account and sharing notes.
Creates a new dictionary-word friend code and fixed auto password.
Internet connection required for podcast streaming.
Internet connection required for podcast search.
Internet connection required to load episodes.
Connect Wi-Fi to search and stream. Saved episodes work offline.
Saved to Podcasts folder on SD card.
Permanently deletes this playlist. Music files on your device are not removed.
Permanently deletes this playlist from your Deezer account, including all tracks in it. Saved local copies are not removed.

Hold OK on a track to pick it up.

Scroll the wheel to move it — the tracks above and below show where it will land.

Press OK again to place it.

Press Back to cancel and restore the original order.
Press OK again to place the track.
Hold OK — pick up the track, then scroll to move it in the queue.
Restarting to complete update, ETA 3 Minutes
No saved episodes on SD card.
%1$d podcast(s) hidden — feed or audio not reachable on this device.
%1$d episode(s) hidden — audio not reachable on this device.
Do you want to shut down the device?
⚠️System security prevents powering off directly from the app.
Switch to Rockbox now? Solar will close until you switch back from Rockbox.
Rockbox is not installed on this device.
No reboot. Switch back from Rockbox System menu or hold Back+Play.
Use themes from /JJ_Themes/ instead of Y1 Themes/
Could not save stream track to playlist: %1$s
Delete all downloaded album covers to free up storage space?
Connect to Wi‑Fi or a local network first
Connect to Wi‑Fi or a local network first
This device does not support EQ presets.
FM hardware not available on this device.
Scan complete — pick a preset or tune manually.
Could not open FM Recordings folder.
Use country and tag browse for now.
